title: Thank you for signing up!

candidate.message: Your account is created. You can now take your first Work Sample and get your Proof Profile.

recruiter.message: Your pilot access request has been recorded. Our team will contact you within 48 hours to set up your access to Proof Profiles.

emailConfirmation: A confirmation email has been sent to you

prepare.title: Choose your role
prepare.description: Backend Go, SRE, or Platform Engineering. Each evaluation is calibrated for your role.

wait.title: Take the Work Sample
wait.description: 45 minutes, realistic scenarios. Get your Proof Profile with score, percentile, and evidence.

prepare.title: Define your criteria
prepare.description: Target role, minimum level, priority skills. We'll configure your access accordingly.

wait.title: Wait for your onboarding
wait.description: Our team will contact you within 48 hours for a personalized onboarding and access to Proof Profiles.

socialProof.candidate: developers already have their Proof Profile
